name: Push Titans
author: Poki
description: Push Titans is a strategic battle game where you defend your kingdom from an invading undead army! Summon powerful champions, choose smart positions on the battlefield, and decide when to spawn more soldiers or upgrade the ones you already have. Earn coins during each fight and use them to strengthen your army for even tougher battles ahead. Can you outthink the undead and protect the kingdom? How to play Push Titans? Click or tap to make the choice to summon champions or upgrade them. Who created Push Titans? Push Titans is created by Toonminator. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Push Titans for free? You can play Push Titans for free on Poki. Can I play Push Titans on mobile devices and desktop? Push Titans can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
